why_v1: A medium-strength hand that already reaches showdown often enough should call instead of bluffing thinly, because raising turns it into a thin bluff.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Calling keeps this medium-strength hand in showdown shape instead of turning it into a thin bluff.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Raising turns this medium-strength hand into a thin bluff, but calling keeps its showdown value intact on the cheaper value path.
